items.ministry: Ministry of Environment, Forest and Climate Change
items.title: Regulatory reforms under Biological Diversity (Amendment) Act, 2023 lead to surge in IPR filings
items.snippet: Press Release Page | Press Information Bureau Ministry of Environment, Forest and Climate Change Regulatory reforms under Biological Diversity (Amendment) Act, 2023 lead to surge in IPR filings Posted On: 01 APR 2026 8:50AM by PIB Delhi A significant increase in Intellectual Property Rights (IPR) applications linked to India’s biological resources has been recorded by the National Biodiversity Authority (NBA), reflec…
